questionHtml: Using information from Table 1, calculate the change in Uruguay’s current account balance between 2018 and 2019.
markschemeHtml:
Current account in 2018:
(18.72 – 19.15) – 3.66 + 0.10 = -3.99

Current account in 2019:
(18.52 – 17.88) – 3.05 + 0.19 = -2.22

Change in the current account balance:
(-2.22) – (-3.99) = (US)$ billion 1.77
 
OR
 
(1.77/3.99) × 100% = 44.36%

Any valid working is sufficient for [1] (eg correct calculation of either initial or final current account balance or if the units are missing).

meta.title: Using information from Table 1, calculate the change in Uruguay’s current account balance between 2018 and 2019.
